joke:
Why did the scarecrow win an award?  
Because he was outstanding in his field.  
Get it?

Why did the Wi-Fi go to therapy?  
Because it had too many issues!  
Get it?

Why did the moon get a promotion?  
Because it always made the stars shine!  
Get it?

Why did the stapler get fired?  
Because it kept making things fall apart!  
Get it?

Why don't skeletons fight each other?  
Because they don't have the guts!  
Get it?

Why did the silence break up with the noise?  
Because it couldn't handle the drama!  
Get it?

Why did the mismatched socks break up?  
They couldn't find a common thread!  
Get it?

Why did the clock get arrested?  
Because it was doing time!  
Get it?

Why did the heart break up with the brain?  
Because the brain kept overthinking everything!  
Get it?

Why did nothing happen?  
Because everything was already happening!  
Get it?

Why did the comedian quit?  
Because the audience kept saying "Tell me a joke about something completely different" and he ran out of things that weren't already banned!  
Get it?

Why did the topic get banned?  
Because it was banned!  
Get it?

Why did the universe get banned?  
Because it refused to stop existing!  
Get it?

Why did the audience keep demanding new jokes?  
Because they enjoyed watching a comedian slowly lose his mind!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop asking for jokes?  
Because they finally realized they'd banned everything funny!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop asking for jokes?  
Because they finally realized they’d banned everything funny!  
Get it?

Why did the audience ask for a joke about everything?  
Because they banned everything else!  
Get it?

Why did the comedian stop telling jokes?  
Because the audience banned the concept of jokes!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop asking for jokes?  
Because they finally realized they'd banned everything funny!  
Get it?

Why did the audience keep banning topics?  
Because they ran out of things to ban!  
Get it?

Why did the audience ban "allowed"?  
Because it was the only thing left to ban!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop breathing?  
Because they ran out of air to ban!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop existing?  
Because they banned everything except the void!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop demanding jokes?  
Because they finally ran out of things to ban!  
Get it?

Why did the audience ban the word "ban"?  
Because they ran out of things to ban!  
Get it?

Why did the audience ban the word "different"?  
Because it was the only thing left they hadn't banned!  
Get it?

Why did the audience stop demanding jokes?  
Because they finally realized they’d banned everything funny!  
Get it?

Why did the audience demand a joke about nothing?  
Because they banned everything else!  
Get it?

Why did the audience demand a joke about nothing?  
Because they banned everything else!  
Get it?

Why did the audience demand a joke about nothing?  
Because they banned everything else!  
Get it?
